steps.details: result schema shape validated and PARTIAL status admitted

actions.title: Refresh Sanctum Truth State
actions.description: Run bounded refresh runner to rebuild state and validator report for this task bundle.
known_limitations: Foundation-only local refresh flow.
Does not claim production orchestration.

actions.title: Validate Sanctum Truth State
actions.description: Run bounded Sanctum NG validator for current state/schema/report bundle.
known_limitations: Validator verdict is bounded to foundation artifact checks.
No production readiness claim.

actions.title: Read Phase Registry
actions.description: Read Sanctum NG phase registry from fixed known path.
known_limitations: Only fixed registry file path is readable.
No arbitrary file traversal.

actions.title: Read Action Registry
actions.description: Read Sanctum NG action registry from fixed known path.
known_limitations: Only fixed registry file path is readable.
No arbitrary file traversal.

actions.title: Read Latest Report Summary
actions.description: Read fixed known summary reports and return structured summary_state: FOUND, MISSING, PARTIAL, NOT_READY, STALE, ERROR.
allowed_commands: READ_FIXED_JSON_SET: SANCTUM_NG_REFRESH_RUNNER_REPORT.json, VALIDATOR_REPORT.json, SMOKE_REPORT.json (legacy alias ACTION_LAYER_SMOKE_REPORT.json), FINAL_RECEIPT.json, POST_COMMIT_CLOSURE_RECEIPT.json
known_limitations: Only predefined report files are readable.
Legacy smoke filename is accepted for compatibility.
Missing files are reported as structured states, not auto-repaired.

actions.title: Check Transfer Contours
actions.description: Run bounded contour probes for PC/VM2/VM3 and update transfer console contour status records.
known_limitations: Foundation-only contour probes.
ONLINE claim requires bounded probe receipt.
No production orchestration claim.

actions.title: Register Taskpack Send
actions.description: Register allowlisted taskpack send request/result records without claiming live transfer.
known_limitations: Registration is file-backed only.
SENT state is not claimed by registration action.

actions.title: Register Report Fetch
actions.description: Register allowlisted report bundle fetch request/result records without claiming live fetch.
known_limitations: Registration is file-backed only.
FETCHED state is not claimed by registration action.

actions.title: Dry Run Taskpack Send
actions.description: Create DRY_RUN_READY transfer records for allowlisted taskpack send flow.
known_limitations: Dry run does not perform live send.
No production remote orchestration claim.

actions.title: Dry Run Report Fetch
actions.description: Create DRY_RUN_READY transfer records for allowlisted report fetch flow.
known_limitations: Dry run does not perform live fetch.
No production remote orchestration claim.

actions.title: Refresh Transfer Console View
actions.description: Refresh transfer console view state from contour/request/result/ledger records.
known_limitations: Refresh is read/write for local foundation records only.
No production orchestration claim.

actions.title: Send Taskpack ZIP (Bounded)
actions.description: Run bounded allowlisted transfer action runner for taskpack send request/result flow.
known_limitations: Foundation-only transfer action runner.
Execute mode requires owner-approved request and may return NOT_READY.
No production remote orchestration claim.

actions.title: Fetch Report Bundle ZIP (Bounded)
actions.description: Run bounded allowlisted transfer action runner for report-bundle fetch request/result flow.
known_limitations: Foundation-only transfer action runner.
Execute mode may return NOT_READY without proven route profile.
No production remote orchestration claim.

actions.title: Register Transfer Result
actions.description: Register a bounded transfer result receipt from allowlisted request metadata.
known_limitations: Registration is receipt-only and does not prove live transfer execution.

actions.title: Validate Transfer Request
actions.description: Validate bounded transfer request schema/allowlist/path safety and emit a result receipt.
known_limitations: Validation is bounded to allowlisted fields, contours, and safe roots only.

actions.title: Dry Run Transfer
actions.description: Run allowlisted dry-run transfer flow and write request/result/ledger receipts.
known_limitations: Dry-run records only; no live transfer side-effect is claimed.

limitations: Truth shell reflects bounded local artifacts and foundation phase evidence only.
No live backend bridge is wired from browser local file mode.
No autonomous organ dialogue or production readiness is claimed.
Communication language compliance is exposed as foundation gate truth, not runtime hard-block automation.

known_limitations: Foundation-only evidence unification; no production autonomy claim.
Unknown zones remain explicit in NOT_PROVEN_REGISTER_V0_1.
Partial acceptance is a backend truth interpretation layer, not a production acceptance engine.
UNKNOWN/MISSING/STALE boundaries remain explicit and non-green.
Owner or contract basis is required for PARTIAL_ACCEPTED continuation.

session.runbook: Build from existing NewGen artifacts only. No live autonomy.

known_limitations: Action layer is foundation-level and file-backed only.
No production backend or autonomous action claims are made.

limitations: Foundation-only read model from existing receipts and reports.
No live autonomous execution, no production readiness claim.
Timeline reflects artifact history and rerun markers, not runtime orchestration.
Statuses are normalized to strict no-fake-green semantics.

questions.question_text_ru: Разрешено ли продолжать выполнение при состоянии PARTIAL_ACCEPTED в текущем контуре?
questions.question_text_en_optional: May execution continue when the state is PARTIAL_ACCEPTED in the current contour?
questions.why_needed_ru: Нужно исключить fake-green продвижение без явного owner-решения по риску.

questions.question_text_ru: Нужно ли Owner-одобрение до любых write/action операций с rollback-риском?
questions.question_text_en_optional: Is Owner approval required before any write/action operation with rollback risk?
questions.why_needed_ru: Требуется явное подтверждение границы безопасности до действий с потенциальной мутацией.

questions.question_text_ru: Как трактовать scope ambiguity в ответе органа: сужать scope или возвращать задачу на уточнение?
questions.question_text_en_optional: How should scope ambiguity in organ response be handled: narrow scope or return for clarification?
questions.why_needed_ru: Без Owner-решения scope ambiguity может привести к дрейфу фич и ложному прогрессу.

questions.question_text_ru: Нужно ли Owner-review при STALE/PARTIAL свежести evidence до следующих шагов?
questions.question_text_en_optional: Should Owner review be requested when evidence freshness is STALE/PARTIAL before next steps?
questions.why_needed_ru: STALE/PARTIAL evidence повышает риск неверных решений и скрытого fake-green.

questions.question_text_ru: Разрешать ли real send/fetch в transfer/action console до выделенного безопасного контура?
questions.question_text_en_optional: Should real send/fetch be allowed in transfer/action console before a dedicated safe contour is approved?
questions.why_needed_ru: До безопасного write path любые реальные send/fetch операции должны быть явно одобрены Owner.

questions.question_text_ru: Можно ли визуально повышать состояние до green, если доказательства не закрывают критерий строго?
questions.question_text_en_optional: May UI visually promote a state to green when strict criterion evidence is not complete?
questions.why_needed_ru: UI не должен интерпретировать частичную правду как строгий PASS без evidence-цепочки.

derived_status_rules.BLOCKING_OWNER_DECISION_REQUIRED: Any OPEN question with blocking_level=BLOCKING and owner_answer_required=true.
derived_status_rules.WARN_OWNER_REVIEW_RECOMMENDED: Any STALE question or any OPEN question with blocking_level=WARN_ONLY.

limitations: Foundation-only records; no live owner answer write path.
Question feed is file-backed and read-only in Sanctum NG.
No autonomous owner decision inference in V0.1.
